sourcePrompt: A diesel generator shed, an open-sided utility shelter about three meters square. A corrugated-tin roof on a rough timber frame covers a chunky skid-mounted diesel generator with a small exhaust stack, a fuel drum standing alongside, and a cable bundle running out under one eave. Rusty tin, dark olive machinery and timber, noisy-looking. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
